loading_tip_1: Save gold at the start; upgrading castle is more stable than building towers blindly.
loading_tip_2: Supply value is linked to castle level, upgrade it to restore troops faster.
loading_tip_3: Armor break is capped at 49% globally, no need to stack too much armor penetration.
loading_tip_4: Heavy armor enemies fear magic towers, light armor foes are weak against arrow towers.
loading_tip_5: Hero HP regeneration per second has a cap, do not tank boss DoT at low HP.
loading_tip_6: Choose the level 5 tower evolution wisely to match your hero build.
loading_tip_7: Fallen troops cost supply, control losses to keep your army strong.
loading_tip_8: Build completion brings balance penalties, avoid mixing all three styles blindly.
loading_tip_9: Use slot machine banish to remove useless skills and free skill slots.
loading_tip_10: Endless monster growth will decay gradually, you can still grow steadily in late waves.
